scripts.db:create:local: echo 'Local D1 database is created automatically when running wrangler dev'
scripts.db:seed: echo 'Use npm run seed from root directory instead'
scripts.db:seed:local: echo 'Use npm run seed --local from root directory instead'
scripts.db:seed:prod: echo 'Use npm run seed from root directory instead'
scripts.db:setup: npm run db:migrate && npm run db:seed
scripts.db:setup:local: npm run db:migrate:local && npm run db:seed:local
scripts.db:setup:prod: npm run db:migrate:prod && npm run db:seed:prod
